name: Tee Timez Mesa Gateway
about: Tee Timez Mesa Gateway is a multi-sport golf simulator venue that combines indoor golf practice with a social environment. The facility offers a range of golf simulator technology for play, practice, and instruction, accessible to both casual golfers and dedicated players. It operates on a membership model with tiered pricing, offering options for frequent players and occasional visitors. The venue is equipped with multiple simulator bays and supports various activities including leagues, lessons, and corporate events, positioning itself as a comprehensive golf entertainment and training facility.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple simulator bays for flexible booking
Range of membership options to suit different play frequencies

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar available with various payment options

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators. The venue does not provide club rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drink are not allowed. The venue has a full bar and kitchen available for your convenience.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The time to play 18 holes varies depending on simulator usage and player pace, but typically it takes about 1-2 hours per round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Tee Timez is kid-friendly and offers junior golf lessons and programs specifically designed for children and teenagers.
